channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Bowl fixer
item.description: Fixes mismatched textures for eternal stew and clayworks

item.title: Riley's Classes Bigger Rucksack Addon
item.description: Riley's Classes Bigger Rucksack Addon

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: More Fog Please
item.description: Increases ambient fog for extra atmosphere.

item.title: Vanilla armory
item.description: Implements unused vanilla weapons and some armor in vanilla style

item.title: Terraria Biome Spread
item.description: Add some difficulty to your world with spreading evils with dangerous enemies and unique mechanics

item.title: Movable Rapid Water
item.description: Allows you to pick up rapid water source blocks with a bucket.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Project Merezha - Client Preview
item.description: Early client support for an upcoming Vintage Story multiplayer games network.

item.title: Longbow To Yumi
item.description: Normal bows are out, asymmetrical bows are in!

item.title: Sleepers
item.description: Log out and your body stays behind; a lootable, killable sleeper holding everything you carried.

item.title: Falx To Katana
item.description: Killing with a Falx has no honour in it, but this does.

item.title: Falx To Mace
item.description: Sometimes simplicity is best, throw your Falx down and take up the Mace!

item.title: Falx To War Axe
item.description: Falx not cutting hard enough, try a hefty War Axe instead.

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.

item.title: Uppsalchemy
item.description: A multi-tier alchemy system that uses A Culinary Artillery bottles.

item.title: Cuniculture
item.description: Makes hare farming viable. Allows them to be fed from small troughs and adds foods to their diet.

item.title: (Not) Just Tofu
item.description: Simple, realistic tofu & miso making process for better vegan protein & dairy food and meal options.

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: Classes of Eriador
item.description: A collection of custom classes for the Kingdom of Eriador Vintagestory server.

item.title: Quarter Redwood Quarter Logs
item.description: Adds a recipe to convert big redwood logs into normal redwood logs and debark them.

item.title: Bigger backpacks
item.description: Doubles the inventory size of backpacks and saddlebags.

item.title: More Fat From Animals
item.description: Increases the ammount of fat received when harvesting animals

item.title: Immersive Debuffs
item.description: Disables sprinting when health or food bars are low.

item.title: Lanterns At Home
item.description: Lanterns offset themselves against their attached block - slabs, chiselled, etc

item.title: Geo Arch Compat
item.description: makes rocks from material needs work with items from medieval arch
